user.title: User Profile
user.description: Stores user registration metadata, identity, and authorization role.

uid.description: Global unique ID corresponding to Firebase Auth UID.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was first initialized.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last updates made to the profile.

configuration.title: Application Configuration
configuration.description: General application configuration document, containing key-value data mappings.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this config was updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user identities and roles used for access control.

/configurations/{configId}.description: Application settings, catalog prices, target list, and supervisor configurations.
